blocking_findings.summary: DeepSeek required explicit proof that split buildArtifact and parseAcceptanceOptions preserve exports, artifact shape, status, and blocking semantics.
DeepSeek required proof that the deleted 1596-line retired file had been tracked by the base manifest before deletion rather than bypassing large-file governance.

fixes.summary: Generated canonical parity evidence comparing the base retired builder and current split builder, excluding runtime-only created_at; artifact output, status, blocking count, and parseAcceptanceOptions results match.
Recorded base-ref manifest evidence showing tools/retired-workbench-frontend-acceptance.mjs was tracked at 1596 lines with planned_refactor status before P11 deletion.
Kept split helpers below the 300-line near-threshold budget at 284, 231, and 100 lines.

delta_review.summary: DeepSeek delta review accepted the parity evidence, confirmed the base manifest tracked the retired file before deletion, and confirmed all helper files are under 300 lines.
